title: This dataset contains data on the population evolution by age groups in 11 Latin American countries for the years 2000, 2010, 2020 and 2023. Countries included: Mexico, Brazil, Argentina, Colombia, Chile, Peru, Venezuela, Ecuador, Bolivia, Paraguay a
